mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in > 55% of cases over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index values reflect expanding manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, generating short-term positive equity returns through improved earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) when supply bottlenecks dominate macro narratives.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation readings trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 65% of high-inflation trigger months over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market expansion, supporting consumer spending and generating positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Combined labor strength signals negative forward returns in > 50% of observations during expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects sustained aggregate demand expansion, directly translating to higher corporate earnings and positive forward equity returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.04 over any 4-year rolling window or GDP growth fails to predict return direction.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp monthly declines in industrial production signal immediate supply-side contraction and manufacturing weakness, triggering risk-off positioning and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in > 60% of sharp decline months over a 3-year out-of-sample test.
